title: api: generic SetResponse<T> for typed create/update results
description:
SetResponse.created and .updated are Option<HashMap<String, serde_json::Value>>. When a UI crate creates a Chat or Message, it receives the created object as an untyped Value and must downcast it manually.

Design:
  pub struct SetResponse<T = serde_json::Value> {
      pub account_id: String,
      pub old_state: Option<String>,
      pub new_state: String,
      pub created: Option<HashMap<String, T>>,
      pub updated: Option<HashMap<String, Option<T>>>,
      pub destroyed: Option<Vec<String>>,
      pub not_created: Option<HashMap<String, SetError>>,
      pub not_updated: Option<HashMap<String, SetError>>,
      pub not_destroyed: Option<HashMap<String, SetError>>,
  }

Usage:
  message_create(...) -> Result<SetResponse<Message>>
  chat_set(...) -> Result<SetResponse<Chat>>
  read_position_set(...) -> Result<SetResponse<ReadPosition>>

Default type parameter = serde_json::Value for backward compat with untyped callers.

Migration: update all existing /set methods to return SetResponse<T> with the correct T. Update all call sites.

Tests: fixture-based round-trip — SetResponse<Message> deserializes created Message fields correctly.
